snippet.title: Delivering a Just Energy Transition: A Guide for Company Action
snippet.description: With the importance of the private sector delivering a just transition, the Council for Inclusive Capitalism and Handshake hosted a conversation on “Delivering a Just Transition: A Guide for Company Action” during the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in Davos, Switzerland. This session explored how companies play a critical role in the global shift to a net-zero economy and how critical it is that this transition includes and responds to the needs of workers, communities, and consumers.

localized.description: With the importance of the private sector delivering a just transition, the Council for Inclusive Capitalism and Handshake hosted a conversation on “Delivering a Just Transition: A Guide for Company Action” during the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting in Davos, Switzerland. snippet.title: Safety is the main focus - Amber | bp
snippet.description:
Amber, who works as a deputy performance manager at Cedar Creek 2, shows us around the site while explaining why safety is so important. For more from bp, subscribe to our YouTube channel: www.youtube.com/@bpplc

There are many different contractors on site the windy and remote Cedar Creek 2. People from all over with different responsibilities are here to ensure the wind turbines are working properly. We get to know more about working on a wind farm when Amber explains what her role involves. She explains that when working with wind turbines one of the most important things is to keep all workers safe which Amber makes sure is the case. 

Would you only like to see a specific part of this video about Amber and her role? Click here for timestamps:

00:00 Intro
00:14 Meet Amber
01:11 Ambers goals

-------------------------

Our purpose is reimagining energy for people and our planet. We want to help the world reach net zero and improve people’s lives. We will aim to dramatically reduce carbon in our operations and in our production, and grow new low carbon businesses, products and services.

We will advocate for fundamental and rapid progress towards Paris and strive to be a leader in transparency. We know we don’t have all the answers and will listen and work with others.

We want to be an energy company with purpose; one that is trusted by society, valued by shareholders and motivating for everyone who works at bp. We believe we have the experience and expertise, the relationships and the reach, the skill and the will, to do this.

Don't forget to subscribe to our channel, turn on notifications, and never miss another video: https://bit.ly/bpSubscribe

-------------------------

In this playlist, you’ll find more videos about how bp takes safety measures.

https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLaxBnE1Fli00WzUGbg7-kL9js6rwiHLFj&si=D_ZR0sAVcKup7Uny 

-------------------------

Want more from bp? Connect with us here:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bp
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/BP_PLC/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bp/

-------------------------

snippet.title: How is tech setting — and measuring — its climate goals?
snippet.description:
Net zero. Carbon offsets. Scope 3 emissions. These are just some of the terms you’ll find in Big Tech’s climate plans. Understanding what they actually mean is vital to ensuring the industry is meeting its goals — and understanding whether those goals are the right ones. We’ll talk with some of the people responsible for setting those goals and experts who are monitoring them to find out what tech companies are really doing.

Welcome Remarks
Bennett Richardson - President, Protocol
Daniel Gribbin - VP of Sustainability and ESG, Emex Software

Speakers
Suzanne DiBianca - Chief Impact Officer & EVP Corporate Relations, Salesforce
Faith Taylor - Global Sustainability Officer, Kyndryl
Jamie Beck Alexander - Director, Drawdown Labs
Shamina Singh - Executive Vice President of Sustainability, Mastercard; Founder & President, The Mastercard Center for Inclusive Growth
Brian Kahn - Climate Editor, Protocol, *Moderator

Presented by Emex Software.

Speakers
Suzanne DiBianca - Chief Impact Officer & EVP Corporate Relations, Salesforce
Faith Taylor - Global Sustainability Officer, Kyndryl
Jamie Beck Alexander - Director, Drawdown Labs
Shamina Singh - Executive Vice President of Sustainability, Mastercard; Founder & President, The Mastercard Center for Inclusive Growth
Brian Kahn - Climate Editor, Protocol, *Moderator

Presented by Emex Software.

snippet.title: "The car will become the most attractive tech product!" | Herbert Diess @ hub.berlin
snippet.description:
#Volkswagen is transforming from an automotive to a tech company. By 2030, software will account for around a third of total sales in the automotive market. The customer experience of driving a car will totally change: the car will become the most attractive tech product! The tech giants have been aware of this for quite a while and want to get inside. This is no surprise, because it's the biggest growth market of the future!

That's why we're going in-house - with #CARIAD – to develop and use our own software. Software will be the decisive factor of our industry. In the future, a car will contain about 200 to 300 million lines of code.

CARIAD is not a sprint, setbacks in individual projects are part of it, we still have to learn software culture. This includes flexibility and speed - a very complex project and plenty of work for about 10 to 15 years. In the last two years CARIAD has learned and the latest software generation is top class in competition. In the tests of the ID.5 and the ID.BUZZ, our Travel Assist can now compete with Tesla's Autopilot in Europe.

Whether it is worth the effort?
Why Autonomous Driving is the massive gamechanger for the automotive industry? 
Which paths do we take to become market-leader in autonomous driving – commercial/private?  
What is in-car experience?
What is the “Big Loop”?
How BIG is the largest Data fleet in the world?

The answers you will get from our CEO Herbert #Diess at the #HUBBerlin 2022 conference. Watch the full video!  (Spoiler to Question 1: It is worth it! ;) )

#vwgroup 


------------------
Further information can be found on http://www.volkswagenag.com and on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/vwgroup

Note in accordance with Directive 1999/94/EC in its currently applicable version: Further information on official fuel consumption figures and the official specific CO2 emissions of new passenger cars can be found in the EU guide "Information on the fuel consumption, CO2 emissions and energy consumption of new cars", which is available free of charge at all sales dealerships, from DAT Deutsche Automobil Treuhand GmbH, Hellmuth-Hirth-Straße 1, D-73760 Ostfildern, Germany and at www.dat.de.

snippet.title: Just Transition: Investor and Company Perspectives
snippet.description:
At this critical time for the energy transition, it is more important than ever that investors and corporations act together to ensure the best possible outcomes for affected people and society. Investors and companies are invited to join Ceres and the Council for Inclusive Capitalism to learn about the Just Energy Transition Framework for Company Action. This Framework is the first-ever guide for companies on concrete actions they can take to implement an energy transition that advances both social and environmental goals. The Framework’s building blocks for action are tied to Climate Action 100+ (CA100+) Net Zero Company Benchmark’s Just Transition Indicator for investor use.

Marcie Frost, CEO of CalPERS, and Lynn Forester de Rothschild, Founding & Managing Partner of Inclusive Capital Partners will introduce the Framework. Anne Simpson, Franklin Templeton Global Head of Sustainability and CA100+ Steering Committee member will demonstrate how the framework maps to the CA100+ Just Transition Indicator. Collaborating partners on the Framework, Sharan Burrows, General Secretary of the ITUC and Mark Carney, UN Special Envoy on Climate Action and Finance will discuss the worker perspective and the need for a Just Transition.

Secretary Jennifer Granholm, head of the United States Department of Energy and a member of the Cabinet of the United States, will share her critical views on the energy transition.

This webinar will feature case studies from Bernard Looney, CEO of bp and Mark Cutifani, Special Advisor, Anglo American about the practical application of the Framework within their corporations.

In this session, participants will:
- Engage on the worker, company and investor perspectives and roles in a Just Transition
- Explore the Framework and alignment with the CA100+ Just Transition Indicator
- Draw from companies and investors on the Framework’s practical application
- Participate in an interactive Q&A and receive relevant learning resources

snippet.title: Jonathan S. Lavine on Private Equity Investing | Masters in Business
snippet.description:
Bloomberg Radio host Barry Ritholtz speaks with Jonathan S. Lavine, who is chief investment officer of Bain Capital Credit and co-managing partner of Bain Capital, a leading private investment firm with some $160 billion in assets under management. Bain Capital Credit, which has $40 billion in assets under management, invests across the spectrum of credit strategies, including leveraged loans, high-yield bonds, distressed debt, private lending, structured products, nonperforming loans and equities. 

Barry Ritholtz looks at the people and ideas that shape markets, investing and business.

Subscribe to Bloomberg Podcasts: https://bit.ly/BloombergPodcasts

snippet.title: Making Aang From "Avatar: The Last Airbender" In Lego Brickheadz
snippet.description:
Today I'm making the main character of the 2005 nominated series: Avatar the Last Airbender.
Aang is fun-loving, somewhat naive, and adventurous with a sense of humor. He possessed deep respect for life and freedom, refused to eat meat, and was often reluctant to fight in his younger years. He craves the stimulation of new people and places. His frequent off-course detours frustrate both allies and pursuers alike. He typically wished to forget his duties as the Avatar and would long for the normality that others possessed. Yet Aang has always prided himself on a complex social network of friends extending over all four nations, and war does not stand in his way. In addition, he looks forward to playing with all the exotic fauna in each place he visits. Whether it is otter penguins, hopping llamas, hog monkeys, or giant koi fish, no fit animal Aang sees goes un-ridden.

snippet.title: Chegg Stock (#CHGG) CHGG Stock News Today 📉 SHAREHOLDERS In CHEGG Stock Securities Class Action
snippet.description:
👉 February 22, 2022 Deadline 👉 Register Now https://bit.ly/CHEGGNYSE  Chegg Stock (#CHGG) CHGG Stock News Today 📉 SHAREHOLDERS In CHEGG Stock Securities Class Action

Chegg Stock and CHGG Stock News Today

Investors who purchased Chegg securities common stock between May 5, 2020 and November 1, 2021 may be entitled to recover losses.

These injured investors have until February 22, 2022 to join the lawsuit as a lead plaintiff.

Contact The Gross Law Firm to inquire about your recovery opportunities.

What is the CHGG lawsuit about?

The complaint filed against Chegg alleges that the company violated federal securities laws by making false and/or misleading statements and/or failing to disclose that:

(i) Chegg's increase in subscribers, growth, and revenue had been a temporary effect of the COVID-19 pandemic that resulted in remote education for the vast majority of United States students and once the pandemic-related restrictions eased and students returned to campuses nationwide, Chegg's extraordinary growth trends would end.

(ii) Chegg's subscriber and revenue growth were largely due to the facilitation of remote education cheating – an unstable business proposition – rather than the strength of its business model or the acumen of its senior executives and directors.

(iii) As a result, the Company's current business metrics and financial prospects were not as strong as it had led the market to believe during the Class Period.

To get information about your rights, submit your information as an investor before the February 22, 2022 deadline.

The Gross Law Firm is ready to help you recoup your losses.


To join Click here 👉 https://bit.ly/CHEGGNYSE

The Gross Law Firm is committed to ensuring that companies adhere to responsible business practices and engage in good corporate citizenship. The firm seeks recovery on behalf of investors who incurred losses when false and/or misleading statements or the omission of material information by a Company lead to artificial inflation of the Company's stock. Attorney advertising. Prior results do not guarantee similar outcomes.

localized.title: Chegg Stock (#CHGG) CHGG Stock News Today 📉 SHAREHOLDERS In CHEGG Stock Securities Class Action
localized.description:
👉 February 22, 2022 Deadline 👉 Register Now https://bit.ly/CHEGGNYSE  Chegg Stock (#CHGG) CHGG Stock News Today 📉 SHAREHOLDERS In CHEGG Stock Securities Class Action

Chegg Stock and CHGG Stock News Today

Investors who purchased Chegg securities common stock between May 5, 2020 and November 1, 2021 may be entitled to recover losses.

These injured investors have until February 22, 2022 to join the lawsuit as a lead plaintiff.

Contact The Gross Law Firm to inquire about your recovery opportunities.

What is the CHGG lawsuit about?

The complaint filed against Chegg alleges that the company violated federal securities laws by making false and/or misleading statements and/or failing to disclose that:

(i) Chegg's increase in subscribers, growth, and revenue had been a temporary effect of the COVID-19 pandemic that resulted in remote education for the vast majority of United States students and once the pandemic-related restrictions eased and students returned to campuses nationwide, Chegg's extraordinary growth trends would end.

(ii) Chegg's subscriber and revenue growth were largely due to the facilitation of remote education cheating – an unstable business proposition – rather than the strength of its business model or the acumen of its senior executives and directors.

(iii) As a result, the Company's current business metrics and financial prospects were not as strong as it had led the market to believe during the Class Period.

To get information about your rights, submit your information as an investor before the February 22, 2022 deadline.

The Gross Law Firm is ready to help you recoup your losses.


To join Click here 👉 https://bit.ly/CHEGGNYSE

The Gross Law Firm is committed to ensuring that companies adhere to responsible business practices and engage in good corporate citizenship. The firm seeks recovery on behalf of investors who incurred losses when false and/or misleading statements or the omission of material information by a Company lead to artificial inflation of the Company's stock. Attorney advertising. Prior results do not guarantee similar outcomes.

snippet.title: UK energy crisis explained | Understanding the energy price cap
snippet.description:
Energy Crisis in the UK just got WORSE. Things were bad enough coming out of the pandemic, but everything that's going on in Ukraine - threw everything out of balance once again. We now have the perfect storm. 

This is what to expect from this video:

► Why energy bills are going up?
► UK energy price cap
► Where 54% hike in bills coming from
► What the UK government doing to help us with the high energy bills
► What we can do to improve the situation
► Why the UK energy crisis will get worse before it gets better. 

I'm seeing fuel prices increasing to nearly £2 per litre in parts of london. That's nearly 50% increase just before the invasion (where prices were already very up). With gas & electricity bills already so high - I'm just hoping for warmer days. 

Are you affected by this? What tips would you share for those wanting to pay less energy bills?

Links mentioned:
► Russia's invasion and its impact: https://youtu.be/9s6pVR1aDRI

► Stock market crash 2022 and inflation due to pandemic: https://youtu.be/VSjpspAg_5I


With hope,
Subtle Investor

snippet.title: SIAS-Sembcorp Marine Virtual Dialogue Session: 20 June 2022
snippet.description:
Afternote for SIAS-Sembcorp Marine Virtual Dialogue Session held on 20 June 2022

(1) In relation to the comment “Basically there's no contingency plan”, Sembcorp Marine would like to clarify that this is in relation to the Proposed Combination. The terms of the Proposed Combination do not provide for renegotiation between the parties if the Proposed Combination is not approved at the Sembcorp Marine EGM.

(2) In relation to the comment “I believe we are able to reach about five to 15% of the market share”, please note that actual future performance, outcomes and results may differ materially as a result of a number of risks, uncertainties and assumptions. You should not place undue reliance on forward-looking statements, which are based on current views regarding future events.

snippet.title: Saskia de Rothschild, on taking over the family business and Hip Hop
snippet.description:
In Wine and Hip Hop Episode 76: Bronx II Bordeaux Featuring Saskia de Rothschild

We're taking it from the Bronx II Bordeaux for the Wine and Hip Hop French Takeover. Jermaine is granted unprecedented access to the prestigious Chateau Lafite Rothschild. 

In this first part, we join Jermaine and Saskia as they discuss the first hip-hop artists that impacted Saskia as a teenager, the importance of story telling, and why she gave up a life of travel and journalism to head up the family business.
